entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Tanungin mo muna ako bago magpaliwanag nang sobra."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Suriin muna ang sagot ko bago ibigay ang sa iyo."

entries.source: "Create geography flashcards"
entries.value: "Gumawa ng heograpiya mga flashcard"

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Bigyan mo ako ng mas mahirap na bersyon pagkatapos kong subukan."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Panatilihin itong beginner-friendly."

entries.source: "Make flashcards for mitosis"
entries.value: "Gumawa ng mga flashcard para sa mitosis"

entries.source: "Turn this note into Q&A"
entries.value: "Gawing Q&Isang talang ito"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Gumamit ng mga halimbawa mula sa exam, proyekto, o araw-araw kong buhay."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI mga prompt

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang tiny una gawain.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End kasama ang isang recap ikaw magsulat yourself.

entries.source: Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Flashcard Builder mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: For Flashcard Builder, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Para sa Flashcard Builder, isang kapaki-pakinabang loop ng pagsasanay ay:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Gawing mga tala o mga paksa tungo sa nakapokus mga flashcard kasama ang mga hint, mga sagot, mga halimbawa, at karaniwang patibongs.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Mahusay mga prompt karaniwan isama tatlo things: ang paksa, iyong kasalukuyan antas, at ang kind ng tulong ikaw gusto. Ikaw gawin hindi kailangan perfect wording. Ikaw lamang kailangan enough konteksto para sa ang session sa magsimula.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Kung ang response feels too broad, narrow ito. Humingi ng isa halimbawa, isa maling akala, isa suriin tanong, o isa susunod hakbang. Kung ito feels too madali, Humingi ng isang challenge. Kung ito feels too mahirap, Humingi ng isang bridge mula sa ano ikaw na alam.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Gumawa ng ang output mas marami kapaki-pakinabang

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Pagsasanay

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Flashcard Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt mga ideya at isang nauulit loop sa pag-aaral para sa getting kapaki-pakinabang pag-aaral mga resulta mula sa Flashcard Builder sa inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Pagbabasa isang AI response ay hindi ang same bilang pag-aaral. Pagkatapos ang una sagot, magtanong ang mode gumawa ikaw gawin something kasama ang ideya.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Kaugnay mga landas sa pag-aaral

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request feedback sa ang part na felt hindi tiyak.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond bago pagtatanong para sa ang solusyon.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang isa malinaw request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Estado ang layunin sa isa sentence.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: study skills sa pag-aaral

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Na huli recap ay important. Kapag ikaw Ipaliwanag ang ideya likod, ikaw reveal Ano ang solid at Ano ang pa rin borrowed mula sa ang AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Ang pinakamahusay mga session sa pag-aaral ay adjustable. Mga card magtanong isa thing at isang oras at isama traps kaya Repasuhin bumubuo understanding, hindi lang recognition.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Flashcard Builder is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Ang pinakamabilis na paraan para makakuha ng halaga mula sa Flashcard Builder ay bigyan ang AI ng gawain sa pag-aaral, hindi lang paksa. Sinasabi ng paksa kung ano ang interesado ka. Sinasabi ng gawain sa pag-aaral kung anong uri ng tulong ang kailangan mo.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Pagkatapos add isang constraint na gumagawa ang session mas marami personal:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Subukan isa ng mga ito starters:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Gawing ang mode inmagsanay

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Exam Prep Planner. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Gamitin Flashcard Builder kapag ito ay ang tama mode para sa ang gawain. Kung ikaw gusto isang kaugnay landas, subukan Paghahanda sa exam Planner. Ikaw Maaari bang also Tingnan ang AI pag-aaral blog para sa study mga paraan, Socratic pag-aaral, mga flashcard, roleplay, at aktibong pag-alala.
